# st-alicloud_emr_cluster_node_group (Resource)

Manages an ECS-based node group (TASK group, supports auto scaling) within an existing AliCloud E-MapReduce (EMR) cluster. Use this resource because alicloud_emrv2_cluster does not expose auto scaling configuration for node groups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the EMR cluster (emrv2) this node group belongs to.
- `instance_types` (List of String) List of ECS instance types eligible for this node group, in priority order.
- `node_group_name` (String) Name of the node group.
- `node_group_type` (String) Type of the node group. Only TASK node groups support auto scaling.
- `system_disk` (Attributes) System disk configuration for nodes in this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--system_disk))
- `vswitch_ids` (List of String) VSwitch IDs the node group's ECS instances can be created in.

### Optional

- `data_disks` (Attributes List) Data disk configuration for nodes in this group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data_disks))
- `graceful_shutdown` (Boolean) Whether to enable graceful decommission for components deployed on this node group.
- `node_count` (Number) Desired number of nodes. Ignored once auto_scaling_policy.enable is true; AliCloud manages the count between min_capacity and max_capacity.
- `payment_type` (String) Payment type for the node group. Valid values: PayAsYouGo, Subscription. Defaults to the cluster payment type when not set.
- `spot_instance_remedy` (Boolean) Whether to replace preempted spot instances automatically when a reclaim notice is received.
- `spot_strategy` (String) Spot strategy for the ECS instances. Valid values: NoSpot, SpotWithPriceLimit, SpotAsPriceGo.
- `subscription_config` (Attributes) Subscription (prepaid) configuration for the node group. Only valid when payment_type is Subscription. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscription_config))
- `with_public_ip` (Boolean) Whether to assign a public IP to nodes in this group.

### Read-Only

- `node_group_id` (String) ID of the node group, assigned by AliCloud.

<a id="nestedatt--system_disk"></a>
### Nested Schema for `system_disk`

Required:

- `category` (String)
- `size` (Number)

Optional:

- `count` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--data_disks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data_disks`

Required:

- `category` (String)
- `size` (Number)

Optional:

- `count` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--subscription_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscription_config`

Required:

- `payment_duration` (Number) Subscription payment duration.
- `payment_duration_unit` (String) Unit for payment_duration. Valid value: Month.

Optional:

- `auto_renew` (Boolean) Whether to enable auto-renewal.
- `auto_renew_duration` (Number) Auto-renewal duration. Takes effect when auto_renew is true.
- `auto_renew_duration_unit` (String) Unit for auto_renew_duration. Valid value: Month.

## Import

EMR cluster node group can be imported using the cluster_id and node_group_id, e.g.

```terraform
terraform import st-alicloud_emr_cluster_node_group.task_node_groups <cluster_id>:<node_group_id>
```
